positive: A sophisticated, whimsical scene depicting a celestial fox (kitsune) surrounded by stylized constellations and flowing aurora borealis. The fox should have a majestic, clean silhouette, embodying grace and mystery. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, utilizing negative space effectively. Style should be a harmonious blend of Art Deco geometry and elegant Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print aesthetics, rendered with strong, deep sapphire blues, shimmering golds, and emerald greens. The background should incorporate intricate, mandala-like geometric patterns that guide the eye. The print must be vector-friendly, with crisp outlines and high contrast suitable for single-color or limited-color screen printing on apparel. Minimal realism, maximum symbolic elegance. Central subject focus, intricate background detail.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, noise, watermarks, text, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photographic, bokeh, messy, grainy, photorealistic, human figure, writing
